config.code:
import pandas as pd
import io
from datetime import datetime

# Parse inputs
df = pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(input_0))
fx = pd.read_csv(io.StringIO(input_1))

# Parse dates
df['Date'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Date'])
fx['Date'] = pd.to_datetime(fx['Date'])

# ── Unit conversions to (kg, liter, metric_ton) ──────────────────────────────
UNIT_MAP = {
    # already normalised
    'kg':          ('kg',          1.0),
    'liter':       ('liter',       1.0),
    'metric_ton':  ('metric_ton',  1.0),
    # mass → kg
    'lb':          ('kg',          0.45359237),
    # volume → liter
    'gallon':      ('liter',       3.78541),
    # mass → metric_ton
    'short_ton':   ('metric_ton',  0.907185),
    # UoM already metric_ton-equivalent (none here, but safe fallback)
}

def normalise_unit(row):
    uom = row['UoM']
    if uom not in UNIT_MAP:
        return pd.Series({'Qty_Normalized': row['Quantity'], 'UoM_Normalized': uom})
    target_uom, factor = UNIT_MAP[uom]
    return pd.Series({'Qty_Normalized': round(row['Quantity'] * factor, 6),
                      'UoM_Normalized': target_uom})

df[['Qty_Normalized', 'UoM_Normalized']] = df.apply(normalise_unit, axis=1)

# ── FX: nearest date lookup ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Build a tidy currency→date→rate dict  (rates are USD per 1 USD = X foreign)
# Column names: USD_EUR means 1 USD = X EUR  →  to get USD we divide by rate
fx_sorted = fx.sort_values('Date').set_index('Date')

def get_rate(invoice_date, currency):
    """Return USD rate for invoice_date/currency.
    Rate columns: USD_XXX  → 1 USD = rate XXX
    So  amount_USD = amount_foreign / rate
    For USD invoices rate = 1.
    """
    if currency == 'USD':
        return 1.0
    col = f'USD_{currency}'
    if col not in fx_sorted.columns:
        return None
    # nearest date
    idx = fx_sorted.index.get_indexer([invoice_date], method='nearest')[0]
    return fx_sorted[col].iloc[idx]

df['Rate'] = df.apply(lambda r: get_rate(r['Date'], r['Currency']), axis=1)

df['UnitPrice_USD'] = (df['UnitPrice'] / df['Rate']).round(6)
df['TotalAmount_USD'] = (df['TotalAmount'] / df['Rate']).round(2)

res = df.to_csv(index=False)
res

config.description: Executive invoice summary dashboard. Show: total spend in USD, breakdown by vendor (bar chart), breakdown by currency (pie), spend by product category, spend by vendor country and top 10 line items by value
config.presentationSpec:
{
  "layout": { "columns": 12, "startColumn": "B" },
  "theme": {
    "primaryColor": "#1B3A5C",
    "accentColor": "#2E86DE",
    "backgroundColor": "#EAF0F6",
    "fontFamily": "Segoe UI"
  },
  "components": [
    {
      "type": "text",
      "position": { "row": 0, "col": 0, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 9 },
      "content": "Executive Invoice Summary Dashboard",
      "style": "title",
      "bold": true,
      "fontSize": 20,
      "color": "#1B3A5C"
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "position": { "row": 0, "col": 9, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 3 },
      "content": "Spend Analytics · 2026",
      "style": "subtitle",
      "color": "#2E86DE",
      "align": "right"
    },
    {
      "type": "metric",
      "position": { "row": 1, "col": 0, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 3 },
      "label": "Total Spend (USD)",
      "formula": "=SUM(${input_0.TotalAmount_USD})",
      "format": "$#,##0",
      "style": "card",
      "valueFontSize": 26,
      "valueColor": "#2E86DE"
    },
    {
      "type": "metric",
      "position": { "row": 1, "col": 3, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 3 },
      "label": "Total Invoices",
      "formula": "=COUNTA(${input_0.InvoiceID})",
      "format": "#,##0",
      "style": "card",
      "valueFontSize": 26,
      "valueColor": "#2E86DE"
    },
    {
      "type": "metric",
      "position": { "row": 1, "col": 6, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 3 },
      "label": "Avg Invoice Value (USD)",
      "formula": "=AVERAGE(${input_0.TotalAmount_USD})",
      "format": "$#,##0",
      "deltaFormula": "=MAX(${input_0.TotalAmount_USD})-AVERAGE(${input_0.TotalAmount_USD})",
      "deltaFormat": "+$#,##0;-$#,##0",
      "style": "card",
      "valueFontSize": 26,
      "valueColor": "#2E86DE"
    },
    {
      "type": "metric",
      "position": { "row": 1, "col": 9, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 3 },
      "label": "Unique Vendors",
      "formula": "=SUMPRODUCT(1/COUNTIF(${input_0.Vendor},${input_0.Vendor}))",
      "format": "#,##0",
      "style": "card",
      "valueFontSize": 26,
      "valueColor": "#2E86DE"
    },
    {
      "type": "separator",
      "position": { "row": 2, "col": 0, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 12 },
      "style": "line",
      "color": "#2E86DE",
      "thickness": 1
    },
    {
      "type": "chart",
      "position": { "row": 3, "col": 0, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 6 },
      "chartType": "Bar",
      "dataSource": "input_0",
      "categories": "Vendor",
      "series": [{ "column": "TotalAmount_USD", "label": "Total Spend (USD)" }],
      "title": "Total Spend by Vendor (USD)",
      "showLegend": false,
      "showDataLabels": false,
      "colors": ["#2E86DE"],
      "axisLabels": { "x": "USD Amount", "y": "Vendor" },
      "aggregation": { "groupBy": "Vendor", "method": "sum" }
    },
    {
      "type": "chart",
      "position": { "row": 3, "col": 6, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 6 },
      "chartType": "Pie",
      "dataSource": "input_0",
      "categories": "Currency",
      "series": [{ "column": "TotalAmount_USD", "label": "Spend Share" }],
      "title": "Spend by Original Currency (USD equivalent)",
      "showLegend": true,
      "legendPosition": "right",
      "showDataLabels": true,
      "colors": ["#2E86DE", "#1B3A5C", "#27AE60", "#E67E22", "#8E44AD", "#C0392B", "#16A085"],
      "aggregation": { "groupBy": "Currency", "method": "sum" }
    },
    {
      "type": "separator",
      "position": { "row": 4, "col": 0, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 12 },
      "style": "space"
    },
    {
      "type": "chart",
      "position": { "row": 5, "col": 0, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 6 },
      "chartType": "Column",
      "dataSource": "input_0",
      "categories": "Description",
      "series": [{ "column": "TotalAmount_USD", "label": "Total Spend (USD)" }],
      "title": "Spend by Product Category (USD)",
      "showLegend": false,
      "showDataLabels": false,
      "colors": ["#1B3A5C"],
      "axisLabels": { "x": "Product Category", "y": "USD Amount" },
      "aggregation": { "groupBy": "Description", "method": "sum" },
      "axisOptions": { "xLabelRotation": 30, "xLabelFontSize": 9 }
    },
    {
      "type": "chart",
      "position": { "row": 5, "col": 6, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 6 },
      "chartType": "Column",
      "dataSource": "input_0",
      "categories": "Country",
      "series": [{ "column": "TotalAmount_USD", "label": "Total Spend (USD)" }],
      "title": "Spend by Vendor Country (USD)",
      "showLegend": false,
      "showDataLabels": false,
      "colors": ["#27AE60"],
      "axisLabels": { "x": "Country", "y": "USD Amount" },
      "aggregation": { "groupBy": "Country", "method": "sum" },
      "axisOptions": { "xLabelRotation": 0, "xLabelFontSize": 9 }
    },
    {
      "type": "separator",
      "position": { "row": 6, "col": 0, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 12 },
      "style": "space"
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "position": { "row": 7, "col": 0, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 12 },
      "content": "Top 10 Line Items by Value",
      "style": "heading",
      "bold": true,
      "fontSize": 13,
      "color": "#1B3A5C"
    },
    {
      "type": "table",
      "position": { "row": 8, "col": 0, "rowSpan": 1, "colSpan": 12 },
      "dataSource": "input_0",
      "columns": ["InvoiceID", "Date", "Vendor", "Country", "Description", "Quantity", "UoM", "Currency", "TotalAmount", "Rate", "TotalAmount_USD"],
      "columnLabels": {
        "InvoiceID": "Invoice ID",
        "TotalAmount": "Orig. Amount",
        "TotalAmount_USD": "Amount (USD)",
        "Rate": "FX Rate"
      },
      "headerStyle": {
        "bold": true,
        "fillColor": "#1B3A5C",
        "fontColor": "#FFFFFF",
        "fontSize": 10
      },
      "alternateRowColor": "#D6E4F0",
      "conditionalFormats": [
        {
          "type": "colorScale",
          "column": "TotalAmount_USD"
        }
      ],
      "sortBy": "TotalAmount_USD",
      "sortOrder": "desc",
      "maxRows": 10
    }
  ]
}
